verses.text: Israel minamte in muan'in a hong neih, i minam lakah ulian ahi, Zion-ah nuamtakin a om hithiat, Samaria-ah lungmuang takin a om note-a' dingin zumhuai mahmah hi

Kalneh khua-ah pai un la limtakin va en un. Tua ciangin Hamath khuapi lian-ah va paisuak un la, Filistia-te' khuapi Gath khua dong va paisuk un. Judah leh Israel kumpi gamte sangin hoihzaw tuan a, amaute' gam pen note' gam sangin lianzaw tuan ahi hiam
Note' tungah siatna hong tun' ni ding, a kipelh theihna ding na hanciam uh a, ahi zongin tua bang na hihnate un, siatna khangsak semsem zawsop hi
Saiha kibawl lupna tungah a lum hithiat, tutphah nip tungah a kizia hiathiat, tuuno sa leh bawngno sa, duhduhin a ne note in gimna na thuak ding uh hi
David bangin la phuah nuam na sa uh a, lasaknate na tum nuam uh hi
Leenggahzu hai lianpipi-in na dawn uh a, sathau hoihpente tawh na kizut uh hi. Ahi zongin Josef minamte' siatna hangin themkhat zong na dah het kei uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin note pen salin a pai masa pente na hi ding uh a, na nopsakna teng uh a beita ding ahi hi

Topa Pasian thupi takin kiciam khin a, Topa, Vanglian Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Israel-te' kiphatsakna ka hua a, a munmuan'huaite uh ka mu nuam kei hi. Tua ahih manin a khuapi leh a sunga a omteng, galte' khutsungah ka pia ding hi
Inn khat sungah mi sawm bek nangawn a suakta a om laina a om leh, tuate khempeuh zong a si khin veve ding hi

Mi khatpeuh a sihna inn panin a vui dingin a si puakhia-in, a behte khatpeuh hong pai ciangin, innsung tawngah a bu mi khatpeuh kiangah, “Hih lai-ah a si dang a om hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Omlo hi; pau kei in. Topa' min na lawhkhak ding kidawm in,” ci-in kidawngkik ding hi
Topa in thu a piak ciangin inn liante kisatzanin inn neute kisatnen ding hi
Sakolte, suangkeen tungah tai thei ngei a, bawngtalte tawh tuipi tung kikho thei ahi hiam? Tua hinapi-in note in thutang, gu na suaksak uh a, thuman, a khial na suaksak uh hi
Lodebar khua bang lel na lakzawhna uhah na lungdam uh a, “Eima thahatna tawh Karnaim khua i lazo hi,” na ci uh hi

Topa, Vanglian Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: No Israel mite a do dingin minam khat ka khangsak ding a, leilu lamah, Hamath khua lutna ciangka panin, leitaw lamah Arabah lui kikal dong, note hong nuaigawp ding uh hi, a ci hi.
